issues.description: G1GC humongous allocations cause stuttering with large texture packs

issues.recommendation: Set -Xmx to at least 4G for modded play
issues.description: Heap too small for modded Minecraft, causes frequent GC and OOM crashes
ZGC is not available on Java 8, causes crash on startup
TieredStopAtLevel=1 disables JIT, causes severe performance degradation
No MaxMetaspaceSize set, can cause unbounded memory growth with large modpacks
SerialGC causes major pauses and stuttering in modded Minecraft
ShenandoahGC on Java 21 with Forge causes rare but reproducible crashes in rendering thread
issues.recommendation: Switch to ZGC or G1GC on Java 21 with Forge

issues.description: Stack size too small, causes StackOverflowError in deeply nested mod code
